validation.note: AI exposure (Eloundou) vs BLS projected growth — two independent inputs. Near-zero correlation ⇒ exposure is not a decline proxy; the risk axis carries distinct information.

meta.note: Full dataset from BLS Employment Projections 2024-2034 joined with Eloundou AI-exposure and O*NET 29.0 importance ratings. `skills` are broad keyword tags (search/labels); `skillVector` is the 68-d O*NET capability vector (35 Skills + 33 Knowledge) used for distinctiveness-weighted FIT. `skillMean`/`skillStd` are the per-dimension market statistics.

aiExposure.name: Eloundou et al. 2023, "GPTs are GPTs" (occupation-level, dv_rating_beta)
